backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features (Partners section and sidebar navigation drawer) to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the FreshGuard React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing page state (home/store/vote), rendering a persistent MenuButton and AppSidebar across all pages, and composing the home page layout with all section components including Partners.
frontend/src/components/AppDemo.tsx: Interactive app demo section rendering a phone mockup with three tabs — food inventory with expiry status, alerts panel, and recipe suggestions — using scroll-triggered entrance animation.
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx: Slide-in left drawer navigation component with backdrop overlay, keyboard/scroll-lock handling, and links to all pages and home page sections.
frontend/src/components/CompanyInfo.tsx: Company info section displaying FreshGuard's mission statement and hover-animated founder cards for CEO, CTO, and COO with scroll entrance animation.
frontend/src/components/FeaturesShowcase: Displays a grid of five FreshGuard device features (carbon filter, ethylene sensor, barcode scanner, Bluetooth, auto-mist) as animated cards with a product image card, using scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with the FreshGuard logo, leadership team names, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with the FreshGuard branding, tagline, and CTA buttons for scrolling to the pitch/demo sections or triggering buy/vote callbacks.
frontend/src/components/HowItWorks.tsx: Presents a four-step process (absorb odors, detect spoilage, scan expiry, alert and cleanse) as animated cards with scroll-triggered visibility transitions.
frontend/src/components/MenuButton.tsx: A fixed-position toggle button that switches between a hamburger and close icon to open or close a navigation menu.
frontend/src/components/Partners.tsx: Shows a partners section with logo cards for Frigidaire, Whirlpool, and KitchenAid, using scroll-triggered fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/SharkTankFinanci: Displays the Shark Tank investment pitch section including the $325K/12.5% equity ask, unit economics, monthly expenses, and two-year revenue projections.
frontend/src/components/SharkVotePage.ts: A voting page for a Shark Tank-style deal where users can vote 'IN' or 'OUT' on a $325K/12.5% FreshGuard investment, displaying live vote counts and a split progress bar.
frontend/src/components/StorePage.tsx: A product store page for the FreshGuard filter ($79.99/unit) with quantity selection, feature highlights, add-to-cart functionality with a timed confirmation message, and a sticky nav bar.
frontend/src/components/TargetMarket.tsx: A scroll-animated section displaying FreshGuard's target demographics as cards and a UVP banner highlighting its combined odor/gas/expiry/mist features.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: A hook that uses IntersectionObserver to set an `isVisible` flag when a referenced element scrolls into view, triggering CSS animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter font, configures Tailwind, defines FreshGuard brand color tokens as OKLCH CSS variables for light/dark modes, and declares keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the FreshGuard frontend, extending the default theme with custom brand colors, gradients, shadows, animations, and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Tracks the FreshGuard project state at version 3, recording two existing features (Partners section and sidebar navigation drawer) and two pending action requests for those same features.
